rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase underTax Code §11.13(b) concerns property tax appraisal and has no relation to Educ. Code §25.032, which governs student assignment or transfer decisions based on national origin or ancestral language.
quote: The board of trustees of a school district, the board of county school trustees, or the person acting for the board must make the decision concerning the assignment or transfer of a student on an individual basis and may not consider as a factor in its decision any matter relating to the national origin of the student or the student's ancestral language.
_note: No overlap between proposed change and rule text; rule addresses student transfers, not property tax exemptions.
